## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the list and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] The repository has a useful, succinct description
- [ ] The link follows the format: `[Name](link) - Description.`
- [ ] The description fits on one line (does not wrap to 3 lines)
- [ ] The entry is placed at the end of the relevant category
- [ ] Title Casing is used for the name ([Title Case Converter](https://titlecaseconverter.com/))
- [ ] The repository has at least a few stars and is actively maintained
- [ ] I have checked spelling and grammar
